response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:40: Identified the performance as 'Kami Hikouki' (Paper Airplane) based on on-screen text. Performed a search for '紙飛行機 藤巻亮太 歌詞' to get the original artist and lyrics. 2. 02:40-04:36: Talk segment. 3. 04:36-05:00: Performance of 'Silent Flame, Never Fade'. Searched for lyrics using title and performer name.
response.global_summary: The video features a concert performance by VTuber Shiranui Flare. The performance begins with a song, followed by a talk segment, and concludes with a full performance of her new original song, 'Silent Flame, Never Fade'.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare sings a cover song, with Japanese text on screen indicating it is a 'Paper Airplane' (紙飛行機) song. The song is 'Kami Hikouki' originally by Ryota Fujimaki. Flare is accompanied by a virtual keyboard on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
空の彼方へ 続く世界よ
誰に会うのか 果てはあるのか
憧れている 黄昏てみる
恋焦がれて今 旅に出たんだ
想いの丈を ノートに記して
紙飛行機 飛ばしてみるんだ
ギターを握って叫んでみる
紙とペンとで夢を描いたら
メロディーの向こう 風をつかまえて
どこか遠くへ 連れてって欲しかった

紙飛行機 飛んで飛んで
故郷の街が小さく見える
みんな元気かい 俺は変わった
胸のざわめき その先へゆくのさ

都会の空に 架かる雨雲
行き詰まりそうな 日だってあるよ
夢の続きが 見つからないまま
必死でもがいた 蜘蛛の巣からは
やがて晴れ間が 覗いていたんだ
見上げていたよ あの景色はきっと
探していた輝きの続き
そんな朝にも太陽は昇り
夏の空気が 風を舞い上げる
もう一度羽ばたく翼が欲しくて

紙飛行機 飛ばす飛ばす
故郷の街が懐かしくなる
みんな元気かい俺は変わった
優しさに触れ 温もりに飢えていた
降り出した雨の匂い
無性に恋しくて立ち止まったんだ
地面の上 濡れたままで 見上げた空
ただ綺麗で
同じように戦っている
あいつの顔を思い出したよ

紙飛行機 飛んで飛んで
今いる場所が小さく見えてるまで
みんな元気かい 俺は変わってゆく
笑顔の先で出会える人がいるから
夏の太陽 飛んでたいよ
紙とペンで 夢描くよ
そしていつか 会いにゆくよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Towards the far side of the sky, the world continues. Who will I meet? Is there an end? I'm longing for it. I try to watch the twilight. I'm love-sick, and now I've set out on a journey. Writing down all my thoughts in a notebook, I try to fly a paper airplane. I grasp my guitar and try to scream. If I draw my dreams with paper and pen, I'll catch the wind beyond the melody. I wanted you to take me somewhere far away. The paper airplane flies, flies, and my hometown becomes smaller. Is everyone doing well? I've changed. The throbbing in my chest, I'll go beyond that. In the city sky, rain clouds are hanging. There are days when I feel stuck. Without finding the continuation of my dream, I struggled desperately. From the spider's web, a clearing soon peeked through. I was looking up. That scenery is surely the continuation of the brilliance I was searching for. On such a morning, the sun rises too, and the summer air dances in the wind. I wanted wings to fly again. The paper airplane flies, flies, and my hometown becomes nostalgic. Is everyone doing well? I've changed. Touched by kindness, I was starving for warmth. I stopped because I was desperately yearning for the scent of the rain that started to fall. On the ground, wet as it was, I looked up at the sky. It was just beautiful. I remembered the face of that person who is fighting in the same way. The paper airplane flies, flies, until the place I am now looks small. Is everyone doing well? I will change. Because there are people I can meet beyond the smiles. Summer sun, I want to fly. I will draw dreams with paper and pen. And someday, I will go to see you.
